payload.claim_text: During the next 6 months, we will meet with relevant stakeholders to discuss targeted strategies to recruit on the job titles within the underutilized categories.
payload.subject: MTA MNR
payload.description: Action strategy to address areas of underutilization

payload.event_name: Young Professional Employee Resource Group Kickoff Meeting
payload.description: Young Professional Employee Resource Group held their kickoff meeting on May 7th at 2 Broadway in the 20th-floor boardroom. The event launched the MTAs 10th ERG with over 100 attendees in person and online.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.event_name: Pride Express Village Historical Walking Tour
payload.description: Pride Express Employee Resource Group hosted a Village Historical Walking Tour to celebrate Pride Month on June 13th. The tour included historical sites instrumental to the LGBTQIA+ movement.
Pride Express and TWU Local 100 led MTA employees in the New York City Pride Parade down 5th Avenue.

payload.event_name: Transport Asian AAPI Heritage Month Event
payload.description: Transport Asian Employee Resource Group held an in-person event to celebrate Asian American Islander Pacific Heritage Month on May 9th. Session focused on building an affinity for the TransportAsian Community.
Veterans Employee Resource Group held a noontime Memorial Day Observance on May 28th at 2 Broadway.
